prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Starter: Roasted Butternut Squash Soup with Sage and Brown Butter Croutons

Main Course: Coq au Vin with Creamy Mashed Potatoes and Garlicky Greens

Dessert: Warm Apple and Pear Crisp with Salted Caramel Ice Cream
